content:
🌟 SpotiFLAC-RU | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide Russian-speaking users with a localized tool to download high-quality FLAC audio tracks from Spotify, sourced from other premium music streaming services.
✨ Key Features: • Downloads Spotify tracks in true FLAC quality • Sources audio from Tidal, Qobuz, and Amazon Music • No Spotify account required • Full Russian interface translation
📖 Summary: SpotiFLAC-RU is a Russian localization of a tool that downloads Spotify tracks in FLAC quality from various streaming services like Tidal, Qobuz, and Amazon Music without requiring a user account. This fork specifically offers a fully translated interface and localized notifications for Russian-speaking users, along with fixes for Windows compilation issues.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
